examples.title: Custom dot styles
examples.description: A timeline with decorative marker snippets for each tone.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Timeline from 'cinder/experimental/timeline';

  const entries = [
    {
      id: 'green',
      datetime: '2026-05-23T13:00:00Z',
      timestamp: '8:00 AM',
      title: 'Health check passed',
      tone: 'success' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'yellow',
      datetime: '2026-05-23T13:05:00Z',
      timestamp: '8:05 AM',
      title: 'Capacity warning',
      tone: 'warning' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'red',
      datetime: '2026-05-23T13:12:00Z',
      timestamp: '8:12 AM',
      title: 'Rollback triggered',
      tone: 'error' as const,
    },
  ];
</script>

<Timeline {entries} label="Incident timeline">
  {#snippet marker(entry)}
    {entry.tone === 'success' ? '+' : entry.tone === 'warning' ? '!' : 'x'}
  {/snippet}

  {#snippet children(entry)}
    {entry.title}
  {/snippet}
</Timeline>

examples.title: Grouped by day
examples.description: A timeline grouped by UTC day while preserving source order.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Timeline from 'cinder/experimental/timeline';

  const entries = [
    {
      id: 'monday-1',
      datetime: '2026-05-18T15:00:00Z',
      timestamp: '9:00 AM',
      title: 'Candidate opened',
      groupLabel: 'Monday, May 18',
      tone: 'info' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'monday-2',
      datetime: '2026-05-18T17:30:00Z',
      timestamp: '11:30 AM',
      title: 'Review completed',
      tone: 'success' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'tuesday-1',
      datetime: '2026-05-19T16:15:00Z',
      timestamp: '10:15 AM',
      title: 'Production rollout paused',
      groupLabel: 'Tuesday, May 19',
      tone: 'warning' as const,
    },
  ];
</script>

<Timeline {entries} groupBy="day" gapThresholdMinutes={90} label="Review timeline">
  {#snippet children(entry)}
    {entry.title}
  {/snippet}
</Timeline>

examples.title: Horizontal timeline
examples.description: A compact horizontal timeline for phase comparisons.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Timeline from 'cinder/experimental/timeline';

  const entries = [
    {
      id: 'intake',
      datetime: '2026-05-20',
      timestamp: 'May 20',
      title: 'Intake',
      tone: 'info' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'design',
      datetime: '2026-05-21',
      timestamp: 'May 21',
      title: 'Design review',
      tone: 'success' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'ship',
      datetime: '2026-05-23',
      timestamp: 'May 23',
      title: 'Ship candidate',
      tone: 'warning' as const,
    },
  ];
</script>

<Timeline {entries} orientation="horizontal" label="Project phase timeline">
  {#snippet children(entry)}
    {entry.title}
  {/snippet}
</Timeline>

examples.title: Vertical timeline
examples.description: A timestamp-first event rail for workflow and audit history.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Timeline from 'cinder/experimental/timeline';

  const entries = [
    {
      id: 'created',
      datetime: '2026-05-23T14:00:00Z',
      timestamp: '9:00 AM',
      title: 'Deployment created',
      tone: 'info' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'validated',
      datetime: '2026-05-23T14:04:00Z',
      timestamp: '9:04 AM',
      title: 'Configuration validated',
      tone: 'success' as const,
    },
    {
      id: 'queued',
      datetime: '2026-05-23T14:10:00Z',
      timestamp: '9:10 AM',
      title: 'Rollout queued',
      tone: 'warning' as const,
    },
  ];
</script>

<Timeline {entries} label="Deployment timeline">
  {#snippet children(entry)}
    {entry.title === 'Rollout queued'
      ? 'Waiting for the current production deploy to finish.'
      : 'Completed by the release automation.'}
  {/snippet}
</Timeline>
